title: pyrenaria microcarpa var. shinkoensis
intro: Pyrenaria microcarpa var. shinkoensis, also known as Shinkoensis, is a variety of the Pyrenaria microcarpa plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the Staphylocarpus family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Shinkoensis is often made into a decoction or tea, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
